description: Implement getRelated() with graph integration - Combine semantic similarity with graph relationships (imports, calls, extends) to find related code elements. The method will use vectorStore.fetchById() to get embeddings, graph-analyzer to traverse relationships, and merge semantic + structural scores.
goal: Enable semantic search to find related code elements by combining vector similarity with structural graph relationships
requirements: Integrate with graph-analyzer for structural relationships (callers, callees, dependents, dependencies)
Use vectorStore.fetchById() to retrieve embeddings for semantic similarity
Implement score merging algorithm for semantic + structural results

functional: getRelated() returns combined semantic and structural results
Merged results are ranked by relevance
